actionLibraryList.title: Mat Knee Pressure 2
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with hips and knees bent, knees hip-width apart. Place your hands behind the thighs, keeping the pelvis and spine neutral. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, pull the thighs toward the torso with your hands while actively pushing the thighs outward against your hands, creating opposing tension. Engage the core and posterior hips, keeping the torso stable.
3.Maintain smooth, natural breathing while sustaining the opposing tension and stability, either holding the position or repeating the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688752079.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower back stable, pressing the sacrum into the mat.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck."}]
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage Core, Hips, Thighs, and Arms.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid sagging or arching the lower back.
2.Do not hold your breath.
3.Keep the shoulders relaxed and shoulder blades stable; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Side-Lying Clam
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your side in a neutral spine position. Relax the chest, align the head, torso, and legs in a straight line, with heels together. Engage the core. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, lift the top leg, engaging the glutes to abduct while keeping the pelvis vertical and stable.
3.Inhale, control the return as the leg lowers back to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770689370239.jpg","context":"1.Allow the shoulders to relax and sink naturally.\n2.Keep the pelvis vertical to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift and engage.
Inhale to lower and return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid tilting or rocking forward/backward.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed; avoid shrugging.
3.Maintain control throughout; avoid losing tension during lowering.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Side-Leg Lift
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your side in a neutral spine position. Extend the top leg and bend the bottom leg so that the foot and hip are aligned, legs stacked. Bend the top arm naturally in front to stabilize on the mat. Relax the chest and engage the core. Inhale, lift the top leg to hip height to prepare.
2.Exhale, engage the top hip to abduct the leg upward to approximately 45°.
3.Inhale, lower the leg with control back to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770689464472.jpg","context":"1.Let the shoulders relax and sink naturally.\n2.Keep the pelvis vertical to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift and engage.
Inhale to lower and return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid tilting or rocking forward/backward.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed; avoid shrugging.
3.Maintain control during the lowering phase; avoid letting the leg drop.

actionLibraryList.title: Leg Lowers
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale and deeply engage the core, drawing the navel toward the spine. Slowly lower the legs toward the floor, keeping the lower back pressed into the mat.
2.Inhale, keeping the legs together, and use your lower abdominal strength to slowly return the legs to vertical. Avoid using momentum or swinging.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770626938342.jpg","context":"1.Press the lower back into the mat and lengthen the spine away from the hips.\n2.Relax the shoulders and shoulder blades, letting them settle toward the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale, lower the legs.
Inhale, return the legs to the start.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the lower body and core.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the lower back in contact with the mat.
2.Do not bend or lock the knees.
3.Avoid shrugging the shoulders or holding your breath.
4.Perform the movement at a controlled pace.

actionLibraryList.title: High Adductor Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Deeply engage the core, drawing the navel toward the spine. Keep the legs together and lifted perpendicular to the floor.
2.Inhale as you slowly open the legs out to the sides to your maximum range, keeping the lower back anchored to the mat.
3.Exhale to bring the legs back together, avoiding momentum or swinging.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770626979035.jpg","context":"1.Press the lower back into the mat and lengthen the spine away from the center.\n2.Let the shoulders and shoulder blades soften and settle down into the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to bring the legs back together.
Inhale to open the legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid lifting or arching through the lower back.
2.Keep the knees straight without locking them.
3.Do not shrug the shoulders or hold your breath.
4.Move with control—avoid rushing the movement.

actionLibraryList.title: Lying Leg Circles
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Deeply engage the core, drawing the navel toward the spine. Keep the legs together and lifted perpendicular to the floor.
2.Inhale as you slowly circle the legs outward and down to your maximum range, keeping the lower back anchored to the mat.
3.Exhale as you circle the legs inward and back up to return together.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627001739.jpg","context":"1.Press the lower back into the mat and lengthen the spine away from the center.\n2.Allow the shoulders and shoulder blades to soften and settle into the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to bring the legs back together.
Inhale to open the legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid lifting or arching through the lower back.
2.Keep the knees straight without bending or locking them.
3.Do not shrug the shoulders or hold your breath.
4.Move with control—avoid moving too quickly.

actionLibraryList.title: Lying Alternating Leg Press
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back in a table-top position, with the arms relaxed at your sides. Keep the pelvis stable and pressed into the mat. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale and extend one leg downward, lowering it to about 45° or slightly below, while keeping the lumbar spine and torso stable.
3.Inhale, engaging the core and hips to control the leg as it returns. Exhale and repeat on the other side, alternating legs.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627477073.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders and neck.\n2.Keep the pelvis stable, with the lower back pressed close to the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to extend. 
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the hips and lower limbs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid sagging or arching the lower back.
2.Avoid using momentum to extend or return too quickly.

actionLibraryList.title: Reverse Crunch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie supine in tabletop position with hands behind the head, head lifted off the mat, shoulder blades slightly off the mat, and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, draw the abdominals inward and upward, slightly posteriorly tilt the pelvis, and bend the hips and knees. Bring the knees toward the chest slowly and in a controlled manner, keeping the torso height unchanged.
3.Inhale, maintain the back and head/neck position, and control the legs as they return to tabletop position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688408481.jpg","context":"1.Keep the head and neck in a neutral, stable position.\n2.Keep the shoulder blades and upper back pressed against the mat, without movement during the exercise."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale, engage the core, posteriorly tilt the pelvis, and bring the knees toward the chest.
Inhale, maintain torso height and control the legs as they return to start.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Do not swing the legs or use momentum to complete the movement.
2.Avoid straining the neck or jutting the chin forward.
3.Prevent excessive back movement; maintain control of the pelvis.

actionLibraryList.title: Reverse Crunch Twist
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie supine in tabletop position with hands behind the head, head lifted off the mat, shoulder blades slightly off the mat, and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, engage the core and posteriorly tilt the pelvis while rotating the torso to the right. Bring the knees toward the body slowly and in a controlled manner, maintaining upper back height and stability.
3.Inhale, rotate the torso back to center, keeping the back stable, and control the legs as they return to tabletop position.
4.Exhale, rotate the torso to the left, repeating the pelvic tilt and bringing the knees toward the body.
5.Inhale, return the torso to neutral, extend the hips, and return to the starting position. Alternate sides continuously.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688429309.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulder blades stable on the mat.\n2.Draw the ribcage inward; avoid flaring."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to engage, tilt, and rotate the torso.
Inhale to return to neutral and stabilize.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Do not swing the legs or use momentum to complete the movement.
2.Avoid straining the neck or jutting the chin forward.
3.Prevent excessive pelvic movement; maintain control.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Leg Sweep
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale and kick the top leg straight forward, gradually increasing the range until it approaches 90 degrees.
2.Exhale and extend the straight leg back, slightly past the body’s midline, focusing on engaging the glutes.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable—only the working leg should move. Avoid any forward/backward or up/down sway caused by the resistance.
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable, no rocking or tilting.
2.Shoulders down, relaxed.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Hip Adduction
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, engage the core, and lift the top leg using the outer glutes; raise only as high as the pelvis remains level.
2.Inhale, resist the band’s tension, and slowly lower the leg back to parallel with the body, maintaining consistent tension.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable—avoid rocking or moving due to band resistance.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628348949.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders.\n2.Keep the top leg straight."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift.
Inhale to lower.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the inner thighs and hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep your pelvis stable—don’t let it tilt or rotate.
2.Avoid shrugging your shoulders.
3.Maintain control during the eccentric phase.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Open Hip Extension
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale. Bend the top knee and abduct the hip upward along the spring’s line of resistance. Point the foot and press it slightly downward, then extend the knee near the top to reach an almost 90° straight-leg position.
2.Exhale. Slightly dorsiflex the foot and lower the straight leg back to the starting position with control.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable; only the working leg moves.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628463258.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Keep your pelvis perpendicular to the floor."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort
Inhale to return
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Stabilize the pelvis; no shifting or tilting.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.

actionLibraryList.title: Side-Lying Leg Sweep
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale and kick the top leg straight forward, gradually increasing the range until it approaches 90 degrees.
2.Exhale and extend the straight leg back, slightly past the body’s midline, focusing on engaging the glutes.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable—only the working leg should move. Avoid any forward/backward or up/down sway caused by the resistance.
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to exert force.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable, no rocking or tilting.
2.Shoulders down, relaxed.

2.Inhale, resist the band’s tension, and slowly lower the leg back to parallel with the body, maintaining consistent tension.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable—avoid rocking or moving due to band resistance.

1.Inhale. Bend the top knee and abduct the hip upward along the spring’s line of resistance. Point the foot and press it slightly downward, then extend the knee near the top to reach an almost 90° straight-leg position.
2.Exhale. Slightly dorsiflex the foot and lower the straight leg back to the starting position with control.
3.Keep the rest of the body stable; only the working leg moves.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628463258.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Keep your pelvis perpendicular to the floor."}]

Exhale on effort
Inhale to return
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Stabilize the pelvis; no shifting or tilting.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.

actionLibraryList.title: Butterfly Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit with the knees bent and the soles of the feet together, drawing them in toward the body. Hold the feet or ankles, lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, and let the shoulders relax down.
2.Inhale to prepare. Exhale as you hinge slightly forward from the hips, maintaining a long spine. At the stretch position, perform small, controlled pulses with an even rhythm. Allow the knees to drop naturally to the sides without forcing, feeling a gentle stretch through the inner thighs and hips while breathing smoothly.
3.Exhale to reduce the range and pause. Inhale with control to return to upright, then repeat.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691248774.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine and a stable pelvis."}]
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch through the hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.
2.Lengthen the spine as much as possible and avoid collapsing the lower back.

actionLibraryList.title: Hamstring Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit tall on the mat with legs extended together or hip-width apart. Flex the feet, lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, lengthen the spine, and let the shoulders relax down.
2.Inhale to prepare, reaching forward to hold the ankles. Exhale as you hinge from the hips into a forward fold, feeling a gentle stretch along the hamstrings. Maintain steady breathing while in the stretch.
3.Exhale with control to return to an upright seated position, keeping the feet flexed and the pelvis stable.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691228783.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine and stable pelvis, avoiding overarching the lower back."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly while in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch along the legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.
2.Lengthen the spine as much as possible, avoiding a collapsed lower back.

actionLibraryList.title: Glutes Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, lower the shoulder blades, and relax the neck. Bring one leg forward, bending at the hip and knee, and extend the other leg back with the thigh on the mat. Keep the hips facing forward without tilting.
2.Inhale to lengthen the spine and level the pelvis. Exhale as you hinge forward from the hips, resting the forearms or forehead lightly on the mat. Maintain the back hip extended forward without collapsing the lower back, feeling a stretch through the hips and glutes. Breathe evenly while holding the stretch.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691212351.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine and stable pelvis, avoiding any tilting."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly while in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch in the hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.
2.Maintain a neutral spine and avoid tilting the pelvis.
